<|file_sep|>README.md
# 🌐 Multilingual Text Classification

This repository contains the code and resources for the paper titled **"Multilingual Text Classification: A Comprehensive Study"**. The study explores the performance of various text classification models across multiple languages, focusing on both high-resource and low-resource languages.

## 📄 Paper

You can access the paper on [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11234).

## 📊 Dataset

The dataset used in this study is available on [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/ManuelFay/multilingual-text-classification).

## 🚀 Getting Started

To get started with the code and reproduce the results, follow the instructions in the `notebooks` directory.

## 📚 Citation

If you use this dataset or code in your research, please cite our paper:

```bibtex
@misc{fay2024multilingual,
      title={Multilingual Text Classification: A Comprehensive Study}, 
      author={Manuel Fay and Yixuan Li},
      year={2024},
      eprint={2409.11234},
      archivePrefix={arXiv},
      primaryClass={cs.CL},
      url={https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11234}, 
}
```

## 📝 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

## 🤝 Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.

## 📧 Contact

For any questions or suggestions, please open an issue or contact the authors directly.

This repository contains the code and resources for the paper titled **"Multilingual Text Classification: A Comprehensive Study"**. The study explores the performance of various text classification models across multiple languages, focusing on both high-resource and low-resource languages.

## 📄 Paper

You can access the paper on [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11234).

The dataset used in this study is available on [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/ManuelFay/multilingual-text-classification).

import argparse

from transformers import LongformerForMaskedLM, LongformerModel


def convert_longformer_checkpoint(checkpoint_path: str, model_type: str):
    model = LongformerModel.from_pretrained(checkpoint_path)
    lm_model = LongformerForMaskedLM.from_pretrained(checkpoint_path)

    assert model_type in ["base", "large"]

    if model_type == "base":
        url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/allenai/longformer/master/scripts/longformer-base-4096.py"
    else:
        url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/allenai/longformer/master/scripts/longformer-large-4096.py"

    from runpy import run_path

    orig_model = run_path(url)["LongformerModel"]

    state_dict = model.state_dict()

    def check_equal(state_dict_name, orig_model_name):
        assert (
            state_dict[state_dict_name].shape == getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).shape
        ), f"{state_dict[state_dict_name].shape} vs {getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).shape}"
        assert (
            state_dict[state_dict_name] == getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).data
        ).all().item(), f"{state_dict_name} vs {orig_model_name}"

    def check_equal_lm(state_dict_name, orig_model_name):
        lm_state_dict = lm_model.state_dict()
        assert (
            lm_state_dict[state_dict_name].shape == getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).shape
        ), f"{state_dict[state_dict_name].shape} vs {getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).shape}"
        assert (
            lm_state_dict[state_dict_name] == getattr(orig_model, orig_model_name).data
        ).all().item(), f"{state_dict_name} vs {orig_model_name}"

    check_equal("longformer.embeddings.word_embeddings.weight", "embeddings.word_embeddings.weight")
    check_equal("longformer.embeddings.position_embeddings.weight", "embeddings.position_embeddings.weight")
    check_equal("longformer.embeddings.token_type_embeddings.weight", "embeddings.token_type_embeddings.weight")

    for i in range(model.config.num_hidden_layers):
        check_equal(f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.output.dense.weight", f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.dense")
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.output.dense.bias", f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.dense.bias"
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.query.weight", f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.weight"
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.query.bias",
            f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.bias",
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.key.weight", f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.weight"
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.key.bias",
            f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.bias",
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.value.weight", f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.weight"
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.value.bias",
            f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv.bias",
        )

            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.query_global.weight",
            f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv_global.weight",
        )
        check_equal(
            f"longformer.encoder.layer.{i}.attention.self.query_global.bias",
            f"encoder.layer.{i}.attention.qkv_global.bias",

package com.zheng.algorithm.leetcode.easy;

/**
 * 1009. 十进制整数的反码
 * https://leetcode-cn.com/problems/complement-of-base-10-integer/
 */
public class LC1009 {

    public int bitwiseComplement(int N) {
        if (N == 0) {
            return 1;
        }
        int mask = 1;
        while (mask < N) {
            mask = (mask << 1) + 1;
        }
        return N ^ mask;
    }

}
